nasb.text: In the fourth year of King Darius, the word of the Lord came to Zechariah on the fourth day of the ninth month, which is Chislev.

esv.text: In the fourth year of King Darius, the word of the Lord came to Zechariah on the fourth day of the ninth month, which is Chislev.

cnv.text: 大利烏王第四年九月，就是基斯流月初四日，耶和華的話臨到撒迦利亞。

ccb.text: 大流士王四年九月，即基斯流月四日，耶和华的话传给了撒迦利亚。
